backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Fragrance.Intl marketplace backend, defining data types and state for stores, products, orders, carts, payouts, and transactions, while mixing in authorization, blob storage, and user approval modules.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping a single frontend authorization error handling feature (toast notifications for unauthorized store/product operations) to its relevant source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of pages, components, hooks, and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Fragrance.Intl frontend SPA, mounting the React app at the `#root` div and loading the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application file that configures TanStack Router with all page routes (including auctions, trade offers, vendor, admin, and payment routes) and wraps the app in a layout with Header, Footer, profile setup modal, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/ApprovalDa: Admin component that lists vendor approval requests with their status badges and provides Approve/Reject action buttons, using toast notifications for feedback.
frontend/src/components/admin/AuctionMan: Admin panel component that displays all auctions in a sortable table with status badges and Cancel/Finalize action buttons, using skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrderManag: Admin panel component that displays all orders in a filterable table and allows updating individual order statuses via a dropdown select.
frontend/src/components/admin/PayoutMana: Admin panel for managing vendor payouts, including a commission rate editor and a table of all payouts with status update controls.
frontend/src/components/admin/PayoutStat: Small badge component that renders a color-coded label for a given payout status (pending, processing, completed, failed).
frontend/src/components/admin/RoleAssign: Form component that lets an admin assign a role (admin, user, or guest) to a user identified by their principal ID.
frontend/src/components/admin/TradeOffer: Admin panel that lists all trade offers in a sortable table and provides a cancel action for individual offers.
frontend/src/components/auctions/Auction: Card component displaying auction details (title, prices, status) with a live countdown timer and a navigation button to the auction detail page.
Reusable countdown component that calculates and displays time remaining until an auction ends, supporting both compact and full display modes.
Responsive grid layout component that renders a list of AuctionCard components with loading skeletons and an empty state message.
Badge component that renders a color-coded label for an auction's status (active, ended, or canceled).
frontend/src/components/auctions/BidForm: A form component that allows users to place bids on an active auction, validating the bid amount against the minimum required and showing success/error toasts.
frontend/src/components/auctions/BidHist: Displays a scrollable, time-sorted list of bids for an auction, showing bidder address, amount, and timestamp for each entry.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: A button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing a loading spinner during authentication and clearing the query cache on sign-out.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: A modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter their name and optional email to complete profile setup before accessing the marketplace.
frontend/src/components/cart/CartDropdow: A popover cart icon in the navbar that shows the item count badge and a preview of cart items with a link to the full cart page.
frontend/src/components/cart/CartItemRow: Renders a single cart item row with product image, title, quantity, unit price, line total, and a remove button.
frontend/src/components/cart/CartSummary: Displays an order summary sidebar with per-item line totals, a subtotal, and a checkout button.
frontend/src/components/checkout/OrderRe: Shows a final order review step with item list, shipping address, total price, and a Stripe payment button with loading state.
frontend/src/components/checkout/Shippin: A controlled/uncontrolled form for collecting a shipping address with street, city, state, zip, and country fields, with a bypass mode for digital-only orders.
frontend/src/components/common/AccessDen: A centered error display component shown when a user lacks permission to view a page, with an optional link back to the home page.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Renders the site footer with brand info, marketplace navigation links, legal placeholders, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Sticky top header with logo, desktop/mobile nav links (conditionally showing vendor, admin, and orders based on auth/role), cart dropdown, and user profile dropdown.
frontend/src/components/layout/HeroBanne: Full-width hero section with a background image, gradient overlay, headline copy, and CTA buttons linking to the shop and vendor registration pages.
frontend/src/components/orders/OrderStat: Displays a color-coded badge for a given order status (pending, processing, shipped, delivered, canceled).
Renders a horizontal step timeline showing order progress through pending, processing, shipped, and delivered stages, with special handling for canceled orders.
frontend/src/components/products/Product: Card component displaying a product's image, title, type badge, description, price, and an add-to-cart button with loading and out-of-stock states.
Responsive grid that renders a list of ProductCard components, with skeleton loading placeholders and an empty-state message.
frontend/src/components/products/SearchF: Filter bar with keyword search input, category select, product type select, sort-by select, and a clear-all button for resetting active filters.
frontend/src/components/trade/CounterOff: A form component that allows a user to send a counter trade offer by specifying a cash adjustment and optional note, swapping the original offer's items automatically.
frontend/src/components/trade/NewTradeOf: A form component for creating a new trade offer with dynamic offered/requested item lists, cash adjustment, note, and target principal fields.
frontend/src/components/trade/TradeOffer: Displays a single trade offer's details (items, cash adjustment, note, status) with action buttons to accept, reject, cancel, or counter the offer based on perspective.
Renders a list of TradeOfferCard components with loading skeletons and an empty state message.
A small badge component that displays a color-coded trade offer status (pending, accepted, rejected, canceled, countered).
frontend/src/components/vendor/CreateAuc: A form component for vendors to create a new auction with fields for title, product ID, description, starting/reserve price, and end time.
frontend/src/components/vendor/ProductFo: A form component for creating or editing a vendor product, handling fields like title, price, category, product type, stock, and image URL.
frontend/src/components/vendor/ProductLi: Displays a vendor's product list with options to add, edit, and delete products, using a dialog for the product form and toast notifications for feedback.
frontend/src/components/vendor/StoreForm: A modal dialog form for creating or editing a vendor store, with fields for name, description, and contact info, supporting both create and update mutations.
frontend/src/components/vendor/StoreList: Manages a vendor's list of stores (up to 5), allowing creation, editing, and toggling active status, with loading skeletons and a tooltip when the store limit is reached.
frontend/src/components/vendor/StoreProd: Manages products for a specific store, providing an inline form and table UI to add, edit, and delete store products with validation and error handling.
frontend/src/components/vendor/StoreSele: A dropdown selector component that lets vendors switch between their stores, displaying each store's name and active/inactive status badge.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorAuc: Displays a vendor's auctions with live countdown timers, bid counts, and the ability to cancel active auctions, plus a collapsible form to create new auctions.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorOrd: Displays a sortable table of a vendor's past orders with columns for order ID, date, items, gross amount, commission, and net payout, with a link to each order's receipt.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorPay: Shows a vendor's payout history in a table along with summary cards for total earned and pending amounts, using data from the vendor payouts query.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorPro: Renders a form for editing a vendor's store name, description, and contact info, submitting updates via the useUpdateVendorProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorReg: Multi-field registration form that creates a new vendor profile (with optional logo upload) and submits an approval request, storing the vendor ID in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using TanStack Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines all React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for interacting with the backend actor, covering user profiles, roles, admin checks, approvals, products, cart, orders, payouts, auctions, trade offers, and Stripe checkout sessions.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, defines CSS custom properties for a luxury fragrance color palette (light and dark modes), and adds utility classes and print styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin-only page that renders panels for vendor approvals, role assignment, order management, payout management, auction management, and trade offer management, gating access by checking admin status.
frontend/src/pages/AuctionDetail.tsx: Detail page for a single auction showing title, pricing, countdown timer, bid history, and a bid form, fetching auction data by ID from the route params.
frontend/src/pages/Auctions.tsx: Page that lists all active auctions in a grid layout, fetching data via useListActiveAuctions and delegating rendering to AuctionGrid.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Shopping cart page that displays cart items alongside product details and a cart summary with checkout navigation, showing an empty state when no items are present.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Two-step checkout page (shipping address then order review) that collects shipping info, creates a Stripe checkout session, and redirects the user to Stripe for payment.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero banner, three feature highlights (curation, authenticity, delivery), and a grid of up to 8 featured products sorted by quantity descending.
frontend/src/pages/MyOrders.tsx: Displays the authenticated user's order history sorted by date, showing order ID, date, item count, total, status badge, and links to order details and receipt pages.
frontend/src/pages/NewTradeOffer.tsx: Page wrapper for creating a new trade offer, rendering the NewTradeOfferForm component inside a card with a back-navigation link.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Shows a confirmation screen for a placed order, including a status timeline, order ID, line items, and total, with navigation to orders list and receipt.
frontend/src/pages/OrderReceipt.tsx: Renders a printable invoice/receipt for a specific order, displaying shipping address, line items, totals, and transaction details with a print button.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentCancel.tsx: Informs the user that their Stripe payment was cancelled without charge, displaying the order reference and buttons to return to cart or continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Handles the Stripe payment success redirect by confirming the payment via mutation, then displaying a success message and auto-redirecting to the order details page after 3 seconds.
frontend/src/pages/ProductListing.tsx: Product catalog page with search/filter controls and a product grid, managing filter state locally and fetching matching products via useSearchProducts.
frontend/src/pages/TradeOffers.tsx: Page displaying the current user's trade offers split into incoming and outgoing tabs, with counts and a link to create new offers.
frontend/src/pages/VendorDashboard.tsx: Vendor dashboard page showing store selector, quick stats, store list manager, and store product manager; guards access by approval status.
frontend/src/pages/VendorProducts.tsx: Vendor products page that checks approval and stored vendor ID before rendering the ProductListManager component.
frontend/src/pages/VendorRegistration.ts: Vendor registration page with states for unauthenticated, already-approved, submitted, and unregistered users, rendering a registration form for the last case.
frontend/src/types/index.ts: Central TypeScript type definitions mirroring Motoko backend types, covering products, orders, payouts, auctions, and trade offers.
frontend/src/utils/stripe.ts: Utility functions for Stripe Checkout integration: building success/cancel redirect URLs and parsing the checkout session response from the backend.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), OKLCH-based color tokens (gold, cream, bronze, sidebar, chart, etc.), custom shadows, border radii, and keyframe animations. Includes the typography, container-queries, and tailwindcss-animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state at version 3, recording one completed frontend feature (graceful authorization error handling via toast notifications) and one pending backend feature request (AR-1) to implement access control so only store owners/admins can create, update, or delete products.
